about.title: About Us
about.text1: At Doctore.ar we are dedicated to creating innovative technological solutions for the healthcare sector. Our team combines software development experience with a deep understanding of the medical sector's needs.
about.text2: We believe technology should simplify the lives of healthcare professionals, allowing them to focus on what really matters: caring for their patients.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We're here to help. Contact us and discover how we can transform your medical practice.

footer.description: Transforming medical practice management with innovative technology.
